scripts.ai:pack:store: npm run ai:mkdir && repomix src/pages/store src/contexts src/services src/utils functions/index.js functions/merchantOrder.js firestore.rules -o .ai/repomix/store.md
scripts.ai:pack:menu: npm run ai:mkdir && repomix src/pages/merchant/menu src/services/menuManagement.js functions/menuManagement.js src/utils/planCatalog.js firestore.rules -o .ai/repomix/menu.md
scripts.ai:pack:functions: npm run ai:mkdir && repomix functions firestore.rules storage.rules firebase.json package.json -o .ai/repomix/functions.md
scripts.ai:pack:ui: npm run ai:mkdir && repomix src/components src/pages/landing src/index.css tailwind.config.js -o .ai/repomix/ui.md
scripts.ai:pack:docs: npm run ai:mkdir && repomix README.md AGENTS.md docs .agents -o .ai/repomix/docs.md
